subcodes.first_line: O self-sacrificing servant of the Abhá Beauty! In the Qur'án the All-Merciful declareth: "If ye assist God, He will assuredly assist you" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جانفشان جمال ابهی در قرآن حضرت رحمان میفرماید ان تنصروا الله ینصرکم و
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @predictions and prophecies, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
